name: Beaten Batter Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry yeast into 1 cup of the Bake It All Mix.
2. Bring the milk to a boiling point, then cool it to lukewarm.
3. Add sugar and water to the cooled milk.
4. Gradually add this mixture to the dry mix-yeast mixture and beat well.
5. Add egg and vanilla, then beat until smooth.
6. Gradually add the remaining Bake It All Mix until a stiff batter forms.
7. Beat thoroughly until the batter is smooth.
8. Cover and let rise in a warm place until bubbly, about 1 hour.
9. When the batter is light, gently stir down.
10. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into muffin cups, rubbed with shortening.
11. Let rise until double in size, 30 to 40 minutes.
12. Bake in a 375°F oven for 15 to 18 minutes.
13. Remove rolls from the pan while hot and serve warm.
Yield: 12 large rolls
